items.name: TH Monogram Backpack
items.description:
The new mark of distinction. Inspired by our heritage, but designed for tomorrow – our TH Monogram is a modern take on a time-honoured icon. The flaps and straps of this backpack contrast with the bold monogram design of the textured fabric. 

This is a collectable item. Available for 24 hours from September 11th, 4:30pm PDT.
